content.en:
Seeing that the Ultimate Ancient Demon of Dom's main department came out to stop it, the Ultimate Ancient Demon of Dom's main department just snorted coldly and did not continue to attack.

After all, if a big war between the ultimate ancient demons really broke out, they would not necessarily fall, and now was not the time to start a war.

After the Ultimate Ancient Demons of the Dom Main Department retreated, the Arrow Mu Ancient Demon smiled and said: "The Heavenly Ancient Demon did a good job this time, directly killing the three peak Ancient Demon-level powerhouses of the Dom Main Division, and among them, there is a Peak Ancient Demon whose strength and potential are very amazing, it seems that he has a blood relationship with one of the Ultimate Ancient Demons, no wonder the Dom Main Division is so angry." "

"The strength of the Heavenly Ancient Demon is much stronger than we expected, but it's a pity that we didn't pay attention to his move before, otherwise we would know his approximate strength. "The Ancient Demon Dao.

"Being able to kill three peak ancient demon-level powerhouses in a short period of time, his strength should not be weaker than the top few peak ancient demon-level powerhouses in our Luo Mu main department!"

Immediately.

The Stygian Ancient Demon came to Ye Tian.

"Heavenly Ancient Demon, you are very good this time, you killed the three peak Ancient Demon level powerhouses of Dom's main department, what reward do you want?"

The Ancient Demon asked.

"I want a place like the Forbidden Dark Land, to go to this kind of treasure land to comprehend the ultimate ~ extreme rules. "

Ye Tian said.

The Ancient Demon looked at Ye Tian deeply, she suspected that Ye Tian had already comprehended the ultimate rules of the Dark Extreme Dao, otherwise why didn't he continue to stay in the Forbidden Dark Land, and continue to go to such a place to comprehend the ultimate rules of the Extreme Dao!

"No problem!"

The Stygian Ancients agreed.

......

Infinite space.

The Ancient Demon of the Underworld took Ye Tian to shuttle here, and he wanted to send Ye Tian to a place that contained the ultimate rules of the Extreme Dao.

After a long time, they arrived at their destination.

Ye Tian looked around, and saw a special fragment appear not far away.

"This is a space-time bubble fragment, and it contains a treasure land inside, on which the ultimate rules of the Thunder Extreme Dao are born, and you can comprehend it here. "

The Ancient Demon Path.

"Thank you, Lord Immortal!"

Ye Tian thanked.

Instantly, he flew into the space-time bubble fragments.

After that, the Immortal Demon departed.

He knew that with Ye Tian's strength, he could return to the Endless Time and Space Domain, so he would not stay here.

......

Deep in the fragments of the space-time bubble.

Ye Tian found that Thunder Extreme Dao Ultimate Rule Treasure, which was a sea of Thunder Ze, and the power of the Extreme Dao Ultimate Rule Realm was all over it.

"It is indeed the Thunder Extreme Dao Ultimate Rule Treasure Land!"

Ye Tian was quite satisfied, this place was even better than the Forbidden Dark Land.

So in the following years, Ye Tian was here to comprehend the ultimate rules of the Thunder Extreme Dao.

He used other duplicate bodies to continuously analyze and comprehend, and frantically comprehended the mystery of the ultimate rules of the Thunder Extreme Dao.

As the years passed, Ye Tian's comprehension of the ultimate rules of the Thunder System Extreme Dao became deeper and deeper.

After a long time.

Ye Tian finally completely comprehended the ultimate rule of the Thunder Extreme Dao.

Immediately afterward, he began to integrate this wisp of Thunder Extreme Dao Ultimate Rule into his Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Rule.

Another period of time has passed, and the Thunder Extreme Dao Ultimate Rule has been successfully integrated into the Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Rule.

And at this point, Ye Tian's Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Rule was only one step away from true transformation.

"At most, if I comprehend one or two more Extreme Path Ultimate Rules, I will definitely be able to make the Transformation of the Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Rules successful. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently, he traveled through the bubble fragments of this plane, but found no other treasures, so he had to leave here.

......

Infinite space.

This large space-time bubble is changing dramatically every moment, and there is no doubt that this is the best time for spiritual practice, but it is also the most chaotic time.

The three hundred and sixty-five main divisions live in the same large space-time bubble, and the days of peace are gone.

For many of the top tribes, it was the hardest years.

But the Eagle Department is living a very comfortable life, Ye Tian's strength is too strong, unless it is the ultimate ancient demon who makes a move, no one can threaten the Eagle Department.

During this period of time, Ye Tian was also looking for a place involving the ultimate rules of the Extreme Dao in the Endless Time and Space Domain, but even if such a place was discovered, it would be occupied by the major main departments, and it was not easy to find it.

And just like that, the long years passed.

this day.

Ye Tian unexpectedly learned the location of a treasure land.

"The Realm of Yinlan. "

This is a new treasure land, occupied by the main department of Dawnlight.

The main department of Morning Light has three ultimate ancient demons, which is not a powerful main department.

Ye Tian didn't want to offend these three ultimate ancient demons, but he also wanted to enter the Yinlan Realm.

According to his understanding, there was a special treasure in the Yinlan Realm, which contained the power of the ultimate rules of the Golden Extreme Dao, which was very suitable for him to comprehend.

If you comprehend the ultimate rules of the Golden Extreme Dao and then integrate them into the ultimate rules of the Ten Thousand Laws, you may have a chance to complete the final step of the transformation of the Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Rules.

But now the Yinlan Realm has been completely occupied by the main department of Chenguang and blocked with the ultimate formation.

He could copy the body of a peak ancient demon-level powerhouse in the main part of the morning light, and then enter the Yinlan realm to comprehend, but it was easy to be recognized.

And if he dared to kill the peak ancient demon-level powerhouse of the main department of Chenguang and try to replace the identity of the other party, then he would be exposed as soon as possible.

Ye Tian began to think about how to enter the Yinlan Realm of the Morning Light Main.

After thinking about it, Ye Tian finally came up with a solution.

That is, as the peak ancient demon-level powerhouse of a top tribe under the command of the main department of Chenguang, he went to trade with the main department of Chenguang and enter the realm of Yinlan.

This possibility still exists.

......

Under the command of the main department of Chenguang, the top tribe - the mountain and river tribe.

The mountain and river tribe has a peak ancient demon-level existence - the tide ancient demon, this tide ancient demon is very low-key, very reluctant, does not participate in any major things, and is good at life-saving means, has fought for the mountain tribe several times before, and has survived.

It is precisely because of Gou and his low profile that there are very few strong people who are familiar with the Tidal Ancient Demon, and even after countless years, many strong people have almost forgotten the Tidal Ancient Demon.

This time, Ye Tian's target was the Tidal Ancient Demon, he was going to kill the Tidal Ancient Demon, copy the other party's body, and then use the other party's identity to negotiate with the Morning Light Lord.

In the depths of the mountains and rivers tribe, in a dojo shrouded in many formations, the tide ancient demons are retreating and cultivating here.

this day.

Ye Tian came in quietly. []
